title: scaevola balansae
intro: Scaevola balansae, also known as the blue fan flower, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Scaevola balansae include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
